requirement_topic.en: Grid voltage and frequency — nominal system voltage
requirement_topic.zh: 电网电压与频率——额定系统电压
requirement_topic.zht: 電網電壓與頻率——額定系統電壓

summary.en: Barbados operates a 115/200 V (single/three-phase), 50 Hz grid from legacy utility practice. BL&P requires BESS power conversion systems (PCS) to be rated and configured for 115/200 V operation. China’s domestic grid is 220/380 V 50 Hz — frequency is the same, but nominal voltage is different.
summary.zh: 巴巴多斯电网采用115/200V（单/三相）、50Hz的运行制式。BL&P要求BESS储能变流器（PCS）按115/200V进行额定与配置。中国国内电网为220/380V 50Hz——频率相同，但额定电压不同。
summary.zht: 巴巴多斯電網採用115/200V（單/三相）、50Hz的運行制式。BL&P要求BESS儲能變流器（PCS）按115/200V進行額定與配置。中國國內電網為220/380V 50Hz——頻率相同，但額定電壓不同。

standards_or_laws: BL&P Interconnection Requirements (proposed for Barbados distribution)

summary.en: China standard grid voltage is 220/380 V 50 Hz per GB/T 12325 and GB/T 15945. Chinese BESS PCS units are typically designed and tested for 220/380 V operation. A 115/200 V variant or conversion stage is required for Barbados deployment.
summary.zh: 中国标准电网电压为220/380V 50Hz，依据GB/T 12325和GB/T 15945。中国BESS储能变流器通常按220/380V运行设计和测试。在巴巴多斯部署时通常需要115/200V变型或转换级。
summary.zht: 中國標準電網電壓為220/380V 50Hz，依據GB/T 12325和GB/T 15945。中國BESS儲能變流器通常按220/380V運行設計和測試。在巴巴多斯部署時通常需要115/200V變型或轉換級。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 12325-2008 (Power quality — deviation of supply voltage)

gap.en: VOLTAGE GAP: Barbados 115/200 V vs China 220/380 V. Frequency matches at 50 Hz, but nominal voltage differs materially. PCS firmware, protection settings, transformer ratios, and nameplate ratings must be reconfigured or redesigned for 115/200 V. This is not a simple firmware change — it affects hardware selection, insulation ratings, and type-test certificates.
gap.zh: 电压差距：巴巴多斯115/200V对比中国220/380V。两者均为50Hz，但额定电压存在明显差异。储能变流器固件、保护定值、变压器变比及铭牌额定值均须重新配置或重新设计以适应115/200V。这不仅是简单的固件更改，还会影响硬件选型、绝缘等级和型式试验证书。
gap.zht: 電壓差距：巴巴多斯115/200V對比中國220/380V。兩者均為50Hz，但額定電壓存在明顯差異。儲能變流器固件、保護定值、變壓器變比及銘牌額定值均須重新配置或重新設計以適應115/200V。這不僅是簡單的韌體更改，還會影響硬體選型、絕緣等級和型式試驗證書。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard Chinese BESS PCS units rated for 220/380 V cannot be directly connected to the Barbados 115/200 V 50 Hz grid without hardware modification, re-rating, or an intermediate transformer. A 115/200 V-rated and BL&P-approved PCS variant must be supplied. Voltage gap must be closed before other compliance steps are meaningful.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 额定220/380V的标准中国BESS储能变流器无法在不经硬件改造、重新额定或加设中间变压器的情况下直接接入巴巴多斯115/200V电网。须提供额定115/200V且经BL&P批准的储能变流器变型。在解决电压差距前，其他合规步骤都缺乏意义。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 額定220/380V的標準中國BESS儲能變流器無法在不經硬體改造、重新額定或加設中間變壓器的情況下直接接入巴巴多斯115/200V電網。須提供額定115/200V且經BL&P批准的儲能變流器變型。在解決電壓差距前，其他合規步驟都缺乏意義。

requirement_topic.en: Grid-connection technical requirements — IEC 62933 system compliance
requirement_topic.zh: 并网技术要求——IEC 62933系统合规
requirement_topic.zht: 併網技術要求——IEC 62933系統合規

summary.en: BL&P and project scopes commonly reference IEC 62933 series (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) for BESS grid-connection technical requirements, including power quality, protection coordination, anti-islanding, and system-level safety. Utility-scale installations typically require IEC 62933 evidence in interconnection packets.
summary.zh: BL&P及项目技术范围常常参照IEC 62933系列（电化学储能系统）制定BESS并网技术要求，涵盖电能质量、保护协调、防孤岛及系统级安全。公用规模安装通常要求在并网技术包中提供IEC 62933证据。
summary.zht: BL&P及項目技術範圍常常參照IEC 62933系列（電化學儲能系統）制定BESS併網技術要求，涵蓋電能質量、保護協調、防孤島及系統級安全。公用規模安裝通常要求在併網技術包中提供IEC 62933證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 (Safety requirements for grid-integrated EES systems)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 36558-2022 (BESS grid-connection technical requirements) and GB/T 34131-2017 (BESS for power stations) as the domestic grid-connection baseline. These address similar technical parameters but are structured differently from IEC 62933 and are not accepted as equivalent for Barbados interconnection without IEC mapping evidence.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 36558-2022（储能系统接入电网技术规定）和GB/T 34131-2017（电化学储能电站运行维护规程）作为国内并网基准。这些标准涉及类似技术参数，但结构与IEC 62933不同，未经IEC对照证据不被巴巴多斯并网审批接受为等效标准。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 36558-2022（儲能系統接入電網技術規定）和GB/T 34131-2017（電化學儲能電站運行維護規程）作為國內併網基準。這些標準涉及類似技術參數，但結構與IEC 62933不同，未經IEC對照證據不被巴巴多斯併網審批接受為等效標準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2017 (Electrochemical energy storage for power stations)

gap.en: GB/T 36558 and GB/T 34131 are not accepted substitutes for IEC 62933 in BL&P or project review. Exporters must provide IEC 62933 series test reports or third-party compliance evidence. All IEC 62933 parameters must also be validated at 115/200 V 50 Hz — not at China’s 220/380 V — requiring re-testing or dedicated engineering analysis.
gap.zh: GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131在BL&P或项目审查中不被接受为IEC 62933的替代标准。出口商须提供IEC 62933系列测试报告或第三方合规证据。所有IEC 62933参数还须在115/200V 50Hz条件下验证，而非中国220/380V，因此需要复检或专项工程分析。
gap.zht: GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131在BL&P或項目審查中不被接受為IEC 62933的替代標準。出口商須提供IEC 62933系列測試報告或第三方合規證據。所有IEC 62933參數還須在115/200V 50Hz條件下驗證，而非中國220/380V，因此需要復檢或專項工程分析。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for utility-scale projects — BL&P interconnection and review
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36558 mandatory domestically; not equivalent to IEC 62933

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558 and GB/T 34131 grid-connection documentation is not accepted by Barbados interconnection review as a substitute for IEC 62933 compliance evidence. IEC 62933 series reports from an accredited third-party laboratory, validated at 115/200 V 50 Hz, are required for project approval. An IEC 62933 vs GB/T 36558 gap analysis can support the submission but does not replace test evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131并网文件不被巴巴多斯BL&P并网审查接受为IEC 62933合规证据替代。项目审批须提供经过认可第三方实验室出具的IEC 62933系列测试报告，并须在115/200V 50Hz下验证。IEC 62933与GB/T 36558的差距分析可作为申请支持材料，但不能替代测试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558和GB/T 34131併網文件不被巴巴多斯BL&P併網審查接受為IEC 62933合規證據替代。項目審批須提供經認可第三方實驗室出具的IEC 62933系列測試報告，並須在115/200V 50Hz下驗證。IEC 62933與GB/T 36558的差距分析可作為申請支持材料，但不能替代測試證據。

requirement_topic.en: Coastal environmental derating — salt-mist, heat, and humidity
requirement_topic.zh: 沿海环境降额——盐雾、高温与高湿
requirement_topic.zht: 沿海環境降額——鹽霧、高溫與高濕

summary.en: Barbados is a small tropical island with persistent salt-mist and humidity. Project owners and BL&P generally require BESS enclosures, inverters, and battery modules to be rated and derated for salt-mist exposure (IEC 60068-2-52 or equivalent), high ambient temperatures (typically 30–36°C average with peaks), and sustained humidity conditions above 80%. IEC 62933-3-1 environmental planning requirements apply.
summary.zh: 巴巴多斯是一个全年高湿、盐雾环境的热带岛国。项目业主和BL&P通常要求BESS外壳、逆变器及电池模组按盐雾暴露（IEC 60068-2-52或同等标准）、高环境温度（通常平均30–36°C且峰值更高）和持续高于80%相对湿度进行额定和降额。IEC 62933-3-1环境规划要求适用。
summary.zht: 巴巴多斯是一個全年高濕、鹽霧環境的熱帶島國。項目業主和BL&P通常要求BESS外殼、逆變器及電池模組按鹽霧暴露（IEC 60068-2-52或同等標準）、高環境溫度（通常平均30–36°C且峰值更高）和持續高於80%相對濕度進行額定和降額。IEC 62933-3-1環境規劃要求適用。

summary.en: Chinese BESS products are typically tested and rated for inland or mild-coastal environments per GB/T 36276 and GB/T 2423 environmental test standards. Salt-mist certifications are not always included in standard GB certification packages. IP ratings may be limited to IP54 or IP55, which may be insufficient for direct Caribbean coastal outdoor exposure.
summary.zh: 中国BESS产品通常按GB/T 36276和GB/T 2423环境测试标准针对内陆或轻度沿海环境进行测试和额定。标准GB认证包中不一定包含盐雾等级。IP等级可能为IP54或IP55，对于巴巴多斯沿海户外直接暴露可能不足。
summary.zht: 中國BESS產品通常按GB/T 36276和GB/T 2423環境測試標準針對內陸或輕度沿海環境進行測試和額定。標準GB認證包中不一定包含鹽霧等級。IP等級可能為IP54或IP55，對於巴巴多斯沿海戶外直接暴露可能不足。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-ion battery for electric energy storage)

gap.en: Chinese BESS products may not carry salt-mist certification to IEC 60068-2-52 cyclic severity levels appropriate for sustained Caribbean coastal exposure. IP ratings and thermal management must be re-evaluated for Barbados ambient conditions. Derating curves for capacity and power output at elevated temperatures must be supplied. This is an engineering gap requiring product-specific documentation and is not resolved by GB certification alone.
gap.zh: 中国BESS产品可能未取得适用于加勒比沿海持续暴露的IEC 60068-2-52循环严酷等级盐雾认证。IP等级和热管理须针对巴巴多斯环境条件重新评估。须提供高温下容量和功率输出的降额曲线。这是产品专项文件的工程差距，通用GB认证不能解决。
gap.zht: 中國BESS產品可能未取得適用於加勒比沿海持續暴露的IEC 60068-2-52循環嚴酷等級鹽霧認證。IP等級和熱管理須針對巴巴多斯環境條件重新評估。須提供高溫下容量和功率輸出的降額曲線。這是產品專項文件的工程差距，通用GB認證無法解決。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — project approval and interconnection readiness
mandatory_status.cn: Partial — GB/T 2423.17 salt-mist testing available but not always certified

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS products for Barbados should demonstrate IEC 60068-2-52 salt-mist certification at a severity appropriate for sustained Caribbean exposure, IP65 or higher outdoor enclosure rating, and product-specific thermal derating curves for local ambient conditions. Standard GB/T 36276 packages usually do not include these, so additional testing or documentation is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出口巴巴多斯的中国BESS产品应证明具备适用于加勒比持续暴露严酷等级的IEC 60068-2-52盐雾认证、用于户外安装的IP65或以上外壳等级，以及基于巴巴多斯环境条件的产品专项热降额曲线。标准GB/T 36276认证包通常不包含上述内容，需额外测试或补充文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出口巴巴多斯的中國BESS產品應證明具備適用於加勒比持續暴露嚴酷等級的IEC 60068-2-52鹽霧認證、用於戶外安裝的IP65或以上外殼等級，以及基於巴巴多斯環境條件的產品專項熱降額曲線。標準GB/T 36276認證包通常不包含上述內容，需額外測試或補充文件。
